changes: Sword Oath: Increased potency has changed from 50 to 75.
Sword Oath: Weapon delay will now affect damage output.
Unleash: Auto-attack will now stop in PvE areas when this action is used.
Reload: Now remains in effect until all ammunition is used.
Nocturnal Sect: Increased healing magic potency has been changed from 5% to 10%.
Aspected Benefic: Amount of damage nullified by the barrier from Nocturnal Sect has been increased from 130% of HP restored to 170% of HP restored.
Aspected Helios: Amount of damage nullified by the barrier from Nocturnal Sect has been increased from 120% of HP restored to 150% of HP restored.
Enhanced Benefic: The effect has been changed to grant a 15% chance that your next Benefic II will be a critical heal.
Redraw: Recast time has been reduced from 60 to 30 seconds.
Draw: Effect duration has been increased from 15 to 30 seconds.
Royal Road: The range of the area effect granted by Ewer and Spire has been extended from 15 to 20y.
The Balance: The increased damage effect on a single target has been changed from 10% to 20%.
The Balance: The increased damage effect on a group has been changed from 5% to 10%.
The Bole: Damage reduction on a single target has been increased from 10% to 20%.
The Bole: Damage reduction on a group has been increased from 5% to 10%.
Celestial Opposition: Extended duration of effects cast by self and party members has been increased from 5 to 10 seconds.
Unleash now binds enemies for 6 seconds in PvP areas.
Blizzard: Heavy duration has been reduced from 12 to 8 seconds in PvP areas.
Sleep: Now affects only the selected target in PvP areas; Sleep duration has been reduced from 12 to 8 seconds in PvP areas.
Freeze: Bind duration has been reduced from 12 to 8 seconds in PvP areas.
Night Wing: Effect duration has been reduced from 8 to 6 seconds; Enhanced Night Wing II effect duration increase has been reduced from 12 to 8 seconds.
Stone: Heavy duration has been reduced from 12 to 8 seconds in PvP areas.
Aspected Benefic: The potency of the magicked barrier in PvP areas has been changed to 65% of HP restored.
Stella: Heavy duration has been reduced from 12 to 8 seconds in PvP areas.
The Balance: The increased damage effect does not apply in PvP areas.
The Bole: Damage reduction does not apply in PvP areas.
Weapon Throw: Enhanced Weapon Throw II effect duration increase has been reduced from 9 to 8 seconds.

new_content.name: Xelphatol
new_content.description: New dungeon for level 60 players, item level 210 or above.

new_content.name: The Great Gubal Library (Hard)
new_content.description: New hard mode dungeon for level 60 players, item level 210 or above.

new_content.name: Alexander: The Creator
new_content.description: New raid dungeon for level 60 players, item level 230 or above.

new_content.name: Containment Bay P1T6
new_content.description: New trial for level 60 players, item level 220 or above.

new_content.name: Triple Triad Battlehall
new_content.description: Instanced area where players can gather to challenge one another in Triple Triad.
new_content.npc_location: Triple Triad Master (Gold Saucer X:4.1 Y:7.4)

new_content.name: Wondrous Tails
new_content.description: Journal-based system involving completion of various duties for rewards.

new_content.name: Adventurer Squadrons
new_content.description: System to manage, train, and deploy NPC recruits on missions.
new_content.npc_location: Personnel Officers in Limsa, Gridania, or Ul'dah

new_content.name: Apartments
new_content.description: Personal housing units available in residential districts.
new_content.location: Residential Districts (Mist, The Lavender Beds, The Goblet)

new_content.name: Dueling
new_content.description: PvP feature to test skills against others outside of instances.

new_content.name: Spectator Mode (The Feast)
new_content.description: New feature for custom matches allowing players to observe from multiple camera angles.
new_content.location: Accessed via the Feast custom match interface

housing.name: Compact Level 6 Aetherial Wheel Stand
housing.description: A small metal stand upon which aetherial wheels are placed and spun to charge. Holds three grade 1, two grade 2, and one grade 3 wheel.

housing.name: Mounted Bookshelf
housing.description: A large bookshelf commonly found in private libraries.

housing.name: Great Gubal Floor Lamp
housing.description: A tall, standing lamp of the same design as the light fixtures found in the Great Gubal Library.

housing.name: Knightly Round Table
housing.description: A hand-crafted replica of the table at which the Heavens' Ward hold conclave.

housing.name: Palace Pedestal
housing.description: A box-like pedestal designed according to an adventurer's harrowing recollection of a similar accursed object discovered deep within the Palace of the Dead.

housing.name: Troupe Stage
housing.description: A large portable stage suitable for the performance of concertos or large-scale productions of literary masterpieces such as the Ballad of Longhaft.

housing.name: Round Stage
housing.description: All the world is a stage. Now your room can be even more so.

housing.name: Tier 1 Aquarium
housing.description: A rectangular glass tank that, when filled with water, can serve as a home for select wavekin caught in the wild. The higher an aquarium's tier, the larger the specimens that can be kept within.

glamour.name: Clear Prism
glamour.description: Catalyst used in the projection of glamours
